name: fueleu-maritime-compliance-platform
description: Monorepo: backend (Express API) + frontend (Vite React). Docs at repository root.

scripts.test: npm run test -w fueleu-backend && npm run test -w fueleu-web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w fueleu-backend && npm run lint -w fueleu-web
scripts.build: npm run build -w fueleu-backend && npm run build -w fueleu-web
